title: Paraformaldehyde (PFA) from Powder
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fpe49","text":"This is a guide to prepare PFA from powder. This is useful for PFA Fixation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"7hi3p","text":"Working Dilutions: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fn7pr","text":"Thawed aliquots are stable at 4º C for up to 2 weeks.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dsu2b","text":"Dilute 1 part 2% PFA to 3 parts cells in PBS (eg 60 µl + 180 µl to yield 0.5% final concentration).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Allow paraformaldehyde (PFA) powder to come to room temperature (Stored in refrigerator)
Weigh 10.0 g PFA in fume hood. undetermined Paraformaldehyde Powder (PFA) Contributed by users Catalog #P6148
Flush container with Argon or Nitrogen to prevent air decomposition of p-formaldehyde.
Dissolve in 475 ml distilled H 2 O in 60-70º C water bath on hot plate in fume hood. undetermined **Do not allow water bath to go over 70ºC (formaldehyde will vaporize!).
While disolving, label 100 X 4 ml and 7 X 12 ml tubes (or other combinations of useful aliquots) with the concentration and date.
After 1 hr add 1 or 2 drops of 5M NaOH. 01:00:00 Cloudy suspension will then turn clear.
Allow to cool at room temperature (@2hours) 01:00:00
Add 25 ml 20X PBS ( See Recipie ) undetermined
Filter, aliquot into tubes and freeze. Aliquots good for at least 5 years. Thawed aliquots are stable at 4º C for up to 2 weeks.
Dilute 1 part 2% PFA to 3 parts cells in PBS (eg 60 µl + 180 µl to yield 0.5% final concentration).
